hooks.prompt: Read the file /Users/ks2026/Documents/Projects/2026/st_blog/handoff_summary.md and extract only the first 8 session entries (newest at top). Then read /Users/ks2026/Documents/Projects/2026/st_blog/priorities.md and extract only the content under '## Current Priorities' (stop before '## Completed Priorities'). Return a brief context block with both: the 8 handoff entries for project history and the current priorities for what is next this session.

Read the file /Users/ks2026/Documents/Projects/2026/st_blog/priorities.md. Look in the '## Current Priorities' section for any priority entries marked with ✅. If you find any, move them to the TOP of the '## Completed Priorities' section (directly after the '## Completed Priorities' heading), maintaining reverse chronological order so the most recently completed item is first. Write the updated file. If no ✅ items exist in '## Current Priorities', do nothing and exit.
